heading: Omitted
label: 1477a Omitted

Plan No. 2, § 7(a)(1), 42 F.R. 62461, , which authorized appropriations for Radio Free Europe and Radio Liberty for fiscal year 1973 in an amount of $38,520,000, and also authorized an additional $1,150,000 for nondiscretionary costs, has been omitted in view of the authorization not being extended later than fiscal year 1973.act Jan. 27, 1948, ch. 36, title VII, § 703Pub.
